sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69046" key="muqoplo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡθο-πλόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n69046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">weaving fables</tr_>, of Eros, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">125</biblScope> </bibl> (proparox.).</sense> </entryFree>
